side_effects.description: Hard bumps/knots at injection sites that did not dissipate; possibly granulomas developing under the skin. One hard knot persisted after 2 months. Notes history of granulomas from bug bites.

protocol_notes: OP used a 1 inch needle injected straight in. Had to discontinue GHK-Cu due to injection site reactions. Still had one hard knot remaining after 2 months. Was researching GLP peptides for inflammation and longevity benefits but does not want weight loss/appetite suppression.
